rulings.Case Title: NELLIE BERTUCCI ET AL VS. ANGELIQUE TAVARES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 17, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT WILLOW GRACE's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT DENIED. Moving party failed to show that allegations subject to this motion are improper, irrelevant, false, or not drawn in conformity with the law. = (501/REQ)
